name: Meier Tobler Group AG
summary: Meier Tobler Group AG manufactures and sells heating and air conditioning systems worldwide. Its products include heat pumps, gas condensing boilers, exhaust systems, oil condensing boilers, solar systems, burner gas and oil, storage and water heaters, and district heating stations; and chillers, dry coolers, cooling towers, roof air-conditioning units, absorption chillers, precision air cabinets, and comfort air products. The company also provides small room fans, air heaters, and air curtains, as well as comfort ventilation and central vacuum products; and sanitary systems, such as fittings, installation systems, water heaters, fittings and pipe couplings, pumps, hoses and ventilation materials, sewage systems, and apparatus and fittings. In addition, it offers transmission line and heating cables, keller installations, control and measuring technology, heating circulation pumps, installation systems, floor and underfloor convectors, and installation materials, as well as compressor pressure maintenance services; underfloor heating radiators; chilled beams and fan coils; and labels and fixtures, insulation, and occupational safety consumables and tools. Further, Meier Tobler Group AG provides consulting, planning, construction, ventilation, and maintenance services for building services planners, installers, architects, and building owners. The company was formerly known as Walter Meier AG. The company was founded in 1937 and is based in Schwerzenbach, Switzerland.
